HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

Gaussian.cpp

1
5
6#include "Gaussian.h"
7#include <cmath>
8#include <iostream>
9
10using namespace std;
11
12// -----------------------------
13// Construction
14// -----------------------------
15Gaussian::Gaussian(double wavelength, double waist, rvec focal_point,
16 double eps, rvec propdir, cvec polarisation) {
17 prop = propdir / sqrt(dot(propdir, propdir));
18 k = (2 * PI * sqrt(eps) / wavelength);
19 w0 = waist;
20 focus = focal_point;
21 z = Z0 * (sqrt(eps));
22 p = polarisation;
23 depth = (PI * w0 * w0 * sqrt(eps)) / wavelength;
24}
25
26// -----------------------------
27// Accessors
28// -----------------------------
29double Gaussian::Waist() const { return w0; }
30
31cvec Gaussian::Polarisation() const { return p; }
32
33rvec Gaussian::Propagation() const { return k * prop; }
34
35// -----------------------------
36// Pointwise field evaluation
37// -----------------------------
38cvec Gaussian::EvaluateE(rvec r) {
39 // Centering the coordinate system in the focus point
40 r = r - focus;
41
42 // distance from focus along the propagation axis
43 double Z = dot(r, prop);
44
45 // distance from z axis
46 double rho = sqrt(dot(r - Z * prop, r - Z * prop));
47
48 // beam size at position r
49 double w = w0 * sqrt(1 + (Z / depth) * (Z / depth));
50
51 // curvature of wavefront at position r
52 double C = Z / (Z * Z + depth * depth);
53
54 // Gouy phase
55 double zeta = atan(Z / depth);
56
57 // Electric field of a paraxial gaussian beam
58 return p * (w0 / w) * exp(-rho * rho / (w * w) +
59 I * k * (Z + C * rho * rho * 0.5) - I * zeta);
60}
61
62cvec Gaussian::EvaluateH(rvec r) {
63 cvec propagation(prop);
64 return (1 / z) * cross(propagation, EvaluateE(r));
65}
66
67std::vector<cvec> Gaussian::EvaluateLayeredEandH(rvec /*r*/) {
68 throw std::runtime_error("Gaussian::EvaluateLayeredEandH not implemented.");
69}
70
71// -----------------------------
72// RWG‑weighted integrals
73// -----------------------------
74dcmplx Gaussian::IntegrateE(RWGFun* f) {
75 dcmplx out;
76 cvec (Gaussian::*Evaluationfct)(rvec r);
77 Evaluationfct = &Gaussian::EvaluateE;
78 out = gauss.Integrate(this, Evaluationfct, f);
79 return out;
80}
81
82dcmplx Gaussian::IntegrateH(RWGFun* f) {
83 dcmplx out;
84 cvec (Gaussian::*Evaluationfct)(rvec r);
85 Evaluationfct = &Gaussian::EvaluateH;
86 out = gauss.Integrate(this, Evaluationfct, f);
87 return out;
88}
89
90std::vector<dcmplx> Gaussian::IntegrateLayeredEandH(RWGFun* /*f*/) {
91 throw std::runtime_error("Gaussian::IntegrateLayeredEandH not implemented.");
92}
93
94// -----------------------------
95// Layered‑media wiring (unsupported)
96// -----------------------------
97void Gaussian::setGrnFunLayered(GreenF* /*fGrnFields*/, std::vector<Grid> /*tabGrids*/) {
98 throw std::runtime_error("Gaussian does not support layered Green's functions.");
99}
